calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-15-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for motion to enter default and default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:26:17 a.m. and concluding at 10:40:20 a.m.

Plaintiff Bank of America represented by Adam Brumage, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Randy W. Spinks not appearing.

GEORGE GARCIA (Assistant Vice President with duties of Custodian of Records) is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

Court has reviewed the case and all filings pertaining to this hearing.
Counsel for Plaintiff presents outline, summary of case, and an offer of proof.

GEORGE GARCIA is examined by the Court. Witness attests that statements made by its counsel are true and correct.

The following exhibits are MARKED/ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE:

Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 1 - Account Statements
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 2 - Cardholder Agreement and Changes in Terms

GEORGE GARCIA is under direct examination.

The matter is submitted.
Based on the summary of the case, comments made by Plaintiff's Counsel, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has proven each essential element of the complaint.

COURT FINDS:

1. Defendant is in default of credit card bill
2. Defendant last used the credit card on May-11-2019 and it's last payment of $502.00 was made on Jun-08-2021.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Bank of America, and against Randy W. Spinks, as follows:

Plaintiff's request for $26,145.37 in damages is DENIED. Court finds request unconscionable.
Counsel for Plaintiff presents argument in support of its request for damages. Court maintains its prior ruling.

1. Damages: $24,015.24
2. Costs: $151.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $24,530.24

Proposed judgment signed as modified.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-24-2023 Continued To Feb-15-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-25-2023 Continued To May-17-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-23-2022 Continued To Feb-15-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
